SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Continued To Sep-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 525, Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, clerk-beth wilber: Appellant would not stip to a Pro Tem Judge and also requested a continuance. Parties are sworn. Mr. Richard Weiner objects to the case being returned to Dept. 206, and states he would rather have the matter continued to sitting judge rather than waiting for an available judge.Judge Brant continues the matter to Dept. 206, 9:00am, on Sep-19-08, for assignment to a Superior Court Judge.
